raw.message: 🔍🐶 Die neuen Abenteuer des Such- & Rettungsteams zum Nachspielen zu Hause 🐾💥

hook.summary: A child playing with a new PAW Patrol toy set.
hook.visual_action: A child's hand pushes a blue toy car towards a large PAW Patrol playset on a wooden floor.

scene_flow: Introduction of the PAW Patrol Pup Squad HQ with children playing.
Close-up shots of the toy figures and interactive elements like the elevator.
Demonstration of the car ramp and moving parts of the playset.
Children showing excitement and joy while playing with the set together.
on_screen_text: ... das neue Pup Squad HQ zu den aktuellen Search & Rescue Episoden!
audience_proxy: Parents of young children who are fans of the PAW Patrol series.
